close_reason: Replaced bare integer status codes (401/403/404) with reqwest::StatusCode constants
description:
src/lib.rs:155-158 uses `if status == 404` and `if status == 401 || status == 403`. src/lib.rs:118 uses `status == reqwest::StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`. The integer-literal style works because reqwest::StatusCode implements PartialEq<u16>, but the inconsistency makes the file harder to read.

Fix: pick one style for the whole file. Idiomatic preference: `reqwest::StatusCode::NOT_FOUND`, `UNAUTHORIZED`, `FORBIDDEN` — they document intent and prevent typos (`if status == 4O4` will compile and silently miss). Sibling vault backend uses StatusCode::NOT_FOUND consistently.
title: 401/403/404 branches use bare integer literals; 429 uses StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS — inconsistent
